refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize energy consumption per ton moved to meet or exceed the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the high-level FR into a measurable and actionable sub-FR focused on minimizing energy per ton moved aligns with the acceptance criteria and enables targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure total energy used and tons moved over the evaluation period and verify energy_per_ton ≤ E_target.
sub_frs: Minimize energy consumption per ton moved
Monitor and report energy usage and tonnage moved

candidate_dps: Optimize powertrain control algorithms to reduce energy consumption
Implement real-time energy and load monitoring system
Adaptive task scheduling to balance productivity and energy use
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize powertrain control algorithms to reduce energy consumption

potential_sources: Interaction between powertrain control and vehicle operational modes
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically isolates energy optimization within powertrain control, minimizing coupling with other subsystems.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate and timely telemetry data is available
Risk of suboptimal performance if powertrain control algorithms are not adaptable to varying worksite conditions
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating adaptive task scheduling DP in next decomposition level to further reduce energy consumption.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and embedded control systems responsible for powertrain and energy management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange of real-time energy usage and operational data with NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive operational commands and task schedules from NGHE Solution

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as powertrain control is embedded in Vehicle; low diffusion risk.
Lower containment; would require extensive interface for embedded control.
Minimal containment; primarily remote control, not energy optimization.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Embedding powertrain control algorithms within the Vehicle module maximizes containment and minimizes diffusion, enabling efficient energy optimization.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in integrating adaptive algorithms within existing vehicle control systems
Dependency on accurate telemetry data from external modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Review telemetry interface robustness and consider fallback strategies for data loss.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP directly addresses the refined FR by focusing on powertrain control optimization to minimize energy per ton moved.

diffusion_risks: Telemetry data dependency may cause diffusion if interfaces are not well defined
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module provides strong containment for powertrain control, minimizing diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and energy consumption measurements is feasible within Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of energy optimization DP to Vehicle module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Enhance telemetry interface reliability and error handling
Plan for integration of adaptive task scheduling in subsequent decomposition

decision.justification: While the decomposition is sound, the FR is not yet atomic and the DP selection could be expanded to include adaptive task scheduling for better energy efficiency. The IM assignment is appropriate but telemetry interface robustness needs improvement.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize energy consumption per ton moved
Monitor and report energy usage and tonnage moved

revise.why: Refine FR to atomic sub-FRs to enable more precise DP selection and IM assignment.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely
Powertrain control algorithms can be embedded within Vehicle module
open_risks: Telemetry data loss or inaccuracies impacting energy optimization
Integration complexity within Vehicle control systems
evidence_needed: Telemetry data quality and availability reports
Prototype performance data of powertrain control algorithms
